======= RMA01084Cornell University Library Office of the Assistant Director for the Development of Collections records.13-1-1084Compiled by L.H. Wrubel, B. RichardsDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections

converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Library Office of the Assistant Director for the Development of Collections records.
Cornell University Library., Office of the Assistant Director for the Development of Collections
Reichmann, Felix, 1899-1987.
13-1-1084
23.8 cubic feet. 23.8 cubic feet.
Undated Correspondence, subject files, and records. Correspondence, subject files, and records of library acquisitions kept by Dr. Felix Reichmann, Assistant Director. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 1 3 4 2 1 ======= 1 3 4 2 1 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 3041381
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
L.H. WrubelB. Richards
Date completed:
October 1970February 1971
EAD encoding:
Ann Hubert, November 2003
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence, subject files, and records of library acquisitions kept by Dr. Felix Reichmann, Assistant Director.
RELATED MATERIALS
Includes collections #13-1-720 and #13-1-898.
Cite As:
Cornell University Library Office of the Assistant Director for the Development of Collections records. #13-1-1084. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.
Libraries -- Acquisitions -- New York (State)
